subtitle: PPT → BEAUTIFIED PPT
title: PptPolish

upload.title: Upload PPT / PDF
upload.fileTip: Upload PPT/PPTX or a PDF where each page is a 16:9 slide. We recommend one slide image per page.
upload.modeInfo: 🎨 Beautify Mode: Optimizes original PPT style

config.title: Configuration
config.customModelTip: Manually enter a model name (must match the selected provider's supported models).
config.renderTip: Higher resolution is clearer but slower and heavier (4K for small decks).
config.promptPlaceholder: e.g., Use purple color scheme, keep academic style...
config.tip: Tip: If no response for a long time or generation fails, the API provider might be unstable. Please try again later or switch model/provider.

outline.title: Confirm Outline
